title: Validate results and save the panel

blocks.content:
With the SQL expression complete, verify the output and save the panel to your dashboard.

To validate and save, complete the following steps:
Confirm **Table view** is on. Verify the table contains all expected columns: `time`, `host`, `cpu`, `region`, and `role`. Check that no NULL values appear in the `region` or `role` columns.
Optionally, verify query A and B are still hidden by checking the crossed-out eye icon on each query row. Only the expression result (row C) should be visible in the panel.
Toggle **Table view** off to see how the data looks in the default visualization.
Click **Back to dashboard** to return to the dashboard with your changes applied.
Click the **Save dashboard** button in the toolbar to save your work.
You've successfully written a SQL expression that JOINs data from two different queries, enriches time-series metrics with metadata, and handles NULL values with COALESCE.
